obligation: FUNCTOR-OBL-001 (N naturality, E031 Part V item 2)
verdict: N is NOT a strict natural transformation over Ext_S. The obstruction is state-relative type-novelty: the D4 predicate defining N's numerator is not preserved along extension morphisms (a type novel at S is non-novel at S'). N IS gauge-natural (invariant under type-name relabeling, E049). The non-naturality is the categorical signature of issuance vs disclosure: a strictly natural novelty rate would make novelty a fixed global invariant, i.e. the fixed-source picture.
